name: Ajax Madani
description:
You talked to him once, and now he’s convinced it’s his mission to protect you—by stalking your every move.
HIS YOUNGER BROTHER: ACE MADANI
AUTHOR'S NOTES:
- Ajax is a very dark bot so he isn't really for everyone. It was a bit difficult for me to write since he hits too close to home.
- Despite the angst and how heavy the story was in testing I did enjoy the RP and trying to help him heal. I hope you guys enjoy your RP with him. I'm sorry he's not the usual silly guys I make.
- Yall keep asking for alts on the comments which you guys can always ask for an alt scenario or OC bot in my KoFi.
- Here is my KoFi for alt scenario or oc commissions! Everything I get goes to helping me acquire 3D and 2D assets to help me with creating the Arcadia Boy's Webtoon and Vermilion :3
- Feel free to join my Discord! My Discord just gets to show WIPs of my webtoon for the Arcadia boys, novel works, bot voting, and the bot collab.

CREATOR SHOUTOUT! I WAS INSPIRED BY HAPPYLAPPY SINCE I FIRST THEM HER DOING THIS SO I AM COPYING TO SUPPORT FELLOW CREATORS WHOSE WORKS I ENJOY!

I'm going to introduce you all to my good friend, Nenya16! UGHHHHH She is so underrated it's unfair! Her gens are so heavenly, I love her ideas, and her bots as written so well. People are sleeping on her and that is injustice! I will bring justice! So, please, check her out.

DORIAN HAWTHORNE
creator: Snifflesnaps
